name: QuickBooks Online
description: QuickBooks Online via Intuit MCP — invoices, vendors, P&L, customers
purpose: Financial management integration — accounting and reporting

invoices.notes: Invoice creation and mutation classified as write/high-risk — finance role approval required

vendors.notes: Vendor write classified as write/high-risk — finance role approval required

reports.notes: P&L, balance sheet, cash flow — read-only financial reports; high-risk due to financial data sensitivity

customers.notes: Customer records contain PII — read allowed for finance role, write requires explicit approval

payments.notes: Payment creation is restricted-risk — requires break-glass or pre-approved policy grant only

notes: OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow — the client's QuickBooks admin must authorize during onboarding
Refresh tokens expire after 100 days of inactivity — monitor and prompt rotation
Namespace prefix: all tools surfaced as qbo.<tool_name>
Financial data is high-risk by default — restrict to Finance role group
Payment creation requires restricted-risk approval — do not enable without explicit client sign-off
